programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights

programme.title: Ollie And Friends S7
programme.desc: The Imp builds himself a new robot henchman --- IM2. Unfortunately for him, IM2 is not content with being Number 2 for long. The Imp is jealous of Ollie's latest find: a dinosaur fossil. He decides to one-up Ollie by faking his own complete set of dinosaur bones. As usual, his plan backfires and he gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: Follow five fun-loving penguins—Nugget, Pancake, Looph, Brinicle, and Flutter—living life to the fullest on their very own remote iceberg. Comedic adventures see the colony facing everyday challenges in their frosty world and learning invaluable lessons about friendship, teamwork, and self-discovery.

programme.desc: A group of kids join a secret agency where they learn to use the power of imagination to journey into the Dream World and create fantastic creations in order to help sleeping children being terrorized by the evil Nightmare King who is bent on conquering the Dream World and invading the Waking World.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising S2
programme.desc: The Ninjas embark on brand new exciting adventures!

programme.title: Pokemon Horizons: The Series
programme.desc: The series stars two new protagonists, Liko and Roy, who team up with the Rising Volt Tacklers, a group of adventurers that explore the Pokmon world and visit various regions. As they do, they are pursued by the Explorers, a mysterious organization seeking Liko's pendant for unknown reasons.

programme.title: Kin
programme.desc: Ella pretends to be Ah Yoke's confidante so she can create a rift between Dr Shen and her. Meanwhile, Emily's search to learn more about Jessica's personal life continues to hit dead ends.

programme.title: The Contenders 26
programme.desc: England are being reshaped by Thomas Tuchel, Amad Diallo is a rising star for the Ivory Coast, and the U20 World Cup bodes well for Morocco's future.

programme.title: Taste Of The Country
programme.desc: A brand-new lifestyle and cooking show with chef-turned-farmer Julius Roberts, A Taste of the Country shows how a wonderful change-of-life plan comes together. Over a glorious summer of hard work and fantastic food, the series presents a sun-soaked escape to the country along with delicious, inspiring recipes you can try in your kitchen... wherever you live!

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef's Line?

programme.title: Raid The Cage: Season 02
programme.desc: Two teams of two compete to take prizes from the Cage before the time limit expires and the doors close. Correct answers adds seconds to the clock, allowing to claim more rewards from the Cage. The winning team keeps what they grabbed.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: When aliens misinterpret video-feeds of classic arcade games as a declaration of war against them, they attack the Earth, using the games like PAC-MAN, Donkey Kong, Galaga, Centipede and Space Invaders as models for their various assaults. President Will Cooper has to call on his childhood best friend, '80s video game champion Sam Brenner to lead a team of old-school arcaders to defeat the aliens and save the planet.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Now that Neela and Leonardo are trapped here on Earth, Zachary and Raffles need to take them clothes shopping! They explain to the aliens the importance of not attracting attention and trying to appear as normal as possible, just as Raffles has done on Earth. However the aliens attract the attention of their nosy neighbour Mrs Chandrasekar, who invites herself into the apartment to snoop around.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Leonardo quizzes Zachary about school behaviour but his questions are mostly about how to embarrass at teacher. Sussing his plan, Zachary and Raffles point out that he'll draw the authorities' attention to himself before Raffles. He'll be revealed as an alien! Leonardo realises his mistake. But it's too late - he can't unenroll. He's going to have to go to school!

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: It is Leonardo's first day at school and Zachary reminds Leonardo NOT to draw attention to himself or use his alien powers. Leonardo is supremely confident his Space Force training - his "maximo smarts" -will see him master the situation. Mr Han, the school Principal, meets Leonardo and decides, much to Raffles's horror, that he would like to meet Leonardo's "mother" - Neela.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Zachary continues to try to wrangle Leonardo's attempts to blend in at school. Meanwhile, Raffles can't dissuade Mr Han from meeting Neela. He arrives back at the apartment ahead of Mr Han's visit - to find Neela has used her alien powers to accidentally make all the furniture disappear! Raffles struggles to distract Mr Han both from Neela's answers and the reappearing pieces of furniture.

programme.title: On The Red Dot
programme.desc: In Singapore, 1 in 12 live with chronic pain, mostly women. I Am Living With Pain follows three young women fighting invisible illness, love, work, family and hope.

programme.title: Talking Point
programme.desc: With a fresh approach to tackling the issues of the day, Talking Point investigates a current issue or event, offering different perspectives to local stories and reveals how it all affects you.

programme.title: Crimewatch 2026
programme.desc: A friendly meetup takes a dangerous turn when a young man brandishes a knife to extort money from his friend. Watch how officers from Tanglin Division, working closely with ground teams, swiftly apprehend the suspect and ensured that justice is served.

programme.title: The Contenders 26
programme.desc: Luka Modric is a World Cup specialist, Cape Verde are one of the smallest ever nations to qualify for the World Cup, and we look at host city Atlanta.6.

programme.title: Taste Of The Country
programme.desc: A brand-new lifestyle and cooking show with chef-turned-farmer Julius Roberts, A Taste of the Country shows how a wonderful change-of-life plan comes together. Over a glorious summer of hard work and fantastic food, the series presents a sun-soaked escape to the country along with delicious, inspiring recipes you can try in your kitchen... wherever you live!

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef's Line?

programme.desc: Jamie Oliver embarks on a culinary journey through Georgia, exploring Tbilisi's lively markets and the picturesque Kakheti wine region. Inspired by Georgia's unique cuisine at the crossroads of East and West, Jamie returns home to create his own Georgian-inspired Sunday roast.

programme.title: 梦断香消四十年
programme.desc: 粤剧梦断香消四十年由陈冠卿编剧南宋爱国诗人陆游与早丧双亲的表妹唐琬相爱成婚时值金寇入侵宋皇朝偏安半壁陆游志图光复奈主和派得势而屡遭黜贬更因唐琬婚后三年未孕陆母拜佛信谗说唐琬命里克夫逼唐出家命儿子娶王春娥为妇唐琬悲怀身世竟萌短见幸得赵士程相救赵早年曾属意唐琬复向唐琬提爱唐琬为绝陆游爱念成全其抗金报国之志嫁给了赵氏怨笛双吹陆游再娶日正是唐琬再醮时三年后陆游沈园漫步竟与唐琬赵士程相遇怨侣重逢百感交集赵氏豁达嘱唐琬奉酒以待陆游咫尺天涯唐琬陆游相对唏吁陆游在壁上题钗头凤词后离去唐琬读词伤情病倒王春娥深明大义悯唐遭遇过府问候唐琬已病重和词一首而终四十年后陆游再进沈园伤情伤国荡气回肠缅怀往事犹见唐琬惊鸿照影来.

programme.title: 金庸武侠世界之铁血丹心

programme.title: 男神不败
programme.desc: 慧颖与育洋见面因父亲反对两人交往而闷闷不乐她一直以为育洋是林阿姨的儿子育洋因找不到机会解释而苦恼Alfred得知把育洋隐瞒身份的事告诉慧颖慧颖惊讶对育洋的人格产生怀疑与他大吵一架后决裂.

programme.title: 星洲之夜

programme.title: 星洲之夜
programme.desc: 番薯嫂的女儿被洪老大捉去番薯嫂则昏迷不醒九妹决定在中秋夜义唱为番薯嫂一家筹医药费和赎金洪老大和跛脚龙勾结故意破坏筹款活动要引"哈哈笑"出来小小忍无可忍.

programme.title: 港女野人奇遇记

It revolves around the love story and agony of an orphan, Cut Amirah, an Acheh origin, who lost her whole family due to the tsunami which occurred on the very frightful evening at 4pm, 24 December 2004. The tsunami came carrying a horrifying 9 Richter magnitude scale.

programme.title: Tekan Minyak
programme.desc: Tekan Minyak is a story that revolves around 5 women who call themselves "The Havana Girls". Each of them have their own episodes but they are bonded by the thread of friendship which is held by Zuraidah, the oldest of them. They all started their friendship when they were young from a religious class and after a short separation, they all unite back and the incidents that happen will be core of Drivers.

programme.title: Seindah Cinta Mutiara
programme.desc: This is the story of Mutiara, a woman who must fight hard to build a better life. Despite her efforts, she faces one challenge after another, forcing her to become even stronger in order to endure. Surrounded by people who are cruel and hostile towards her, Mutiara's journey seems relentless. Fortunately, she has a loyal friend in Dianda, who continuously supports and encourages her to persevere.

programme.title: Juara Memasak Senior Vs Junior
programme.desc: Juara Memasak returns with a new spin, pitting youths against their senior counterparts. Can the seniors defeat the youths with their vast experience and knowledge, or will the youths edge the seniors out with their creativity and new innovations? The kitchen is set for the most exciting cook-off battle yet. Watch as they fight to win 25,000 and be crowned as the champion.
